full_text:
Agenda:

- Check the current status of Main branch

 - Where to put the tutorial online?

- Pre & Post result

 - Sample 10 is the current best result

 - Samples 4-7 are not very nice

 - Results available in Datacloud

 - The result keeps stable (75-80%) for multiple rounds

- Go through the method part of the manuscript together

- Teo's notebook and result (where to access)?

 - An example of the analysis workflow will be helpful for Ziqi
 > (pre-processing, visualization functions)

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
- Manuscript

 - Figure: Angela could help with Napari screenshots.

 - Writing: Napari plugin in the method part and the pre-processing
 > of Pre & Post dataset (Angela)

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
- [[[https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-022-01498-z]{.underline}]{.mark}](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-022-01498-z)

 - [If have time, try this CELESTA tool on STELLAR and sample 10 of
 > Pre&Post and compare with Tribus]{.mark}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
- Timeline for Tribus

 - Teo on holiday: July 26th - July 28th

 - Angela back: July 26th

 - Teo remote work: Aug 7th - Aug 15th

 - Anniina back from Boston: Aug 7th

 - We could prepare the first version of the manuscript with
 > figures, and meet with Anniina (maybe on Aug 9th?)

 - We have \~2 weeks to work together and finish the 1st
 > version of Tribus manuscript.

 - Remember to add Teo and Angela in Zotero library.
